content: Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

Lydia: By the tits of Dibella, these damn bandit sluts are getting bolder every day. I’d sooner split their skulls open than let them lay a finger on MJR. They’d love to ride him like a prized stallion, the filthy whores. Mady: Aye, and last time I caught one trying to sneak into his tent, she had a vial of lust potion tucked in her cleavage. Took her head off mid-grope. Lydia: Good. Let ‘em drown in their own blood before they drown in his seed. Though… if they want a taste, they should at least have the decency to kneel and beg like proper submissive sluts. Mady: Hah! You’re one to talk, Lydia. I’ve seen the way you drop to your knees the moment he gives you that look. Lydia: Shut your damn mouth. I serve my thane with honor. If that means sucking his fat Nord cock under a bandit’s twitching corpse, so be it. Mady: Gods, you’re sick. Bet you’d let him mount you right on top of a fresh kill, wouldn’t you? Lydia: Fuck yes. His blood-slick hands on my hips, his breath hot in my ear… Maybe after we gut these bandits, I’ll convince him to claim me in their ruined camp. Show Serana who he belongs to. Mady: Disgusting. I love it. Dibella would weep with pride.
Please wrap up the current topic between the NPCs in a natural way. Nobody is leaving, so there is no need for formal goodbyes.

Lydia: Enough talk. The only thing left to do is bloody our blades and let MJR decide who deserves his favor tonight. Dibella wills it. Mady: Agreed. Let’s make those bandit whores regret they ever left their holes. Their corpses will make fine trophies—and a finer bed for the winner. Lydia: Then quit flapping your mouth and follow me. I didn’t earn my steel just to stand here while thieves and cum-hungry sluts pollute Skyrim’s soil. Mady: Lead on, shield-sister. I’ll be right behind you—watching that tight ass swing with every step. Lydia: Keep staring, and I’ll cut out your eyeballs and feed them to MJR’s gargoyle. Now
